name: dialog
title: Dialog
description: A modal dialog built on Radix UI Dialog. Handles focus trap, scroll lock, and ARIA automatically.
a11y: Focus is automatically trapped inside the dialog when open.
DialogTitle is required — it is the accessible name of the dialog.
DialogDescription is recommended — describes the dialog purpose for screen reader users.

do: Put destructive actions (delete, remove) in a dialog to confirm intent.
dont: Don't open a dialog from inside another dialog — use a drawer or step flow instead.
Don't use dialogs for simple notifications — use a toast.
